name_en: !!️《With full original green box packaging》!!️【New】Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag. This brand-new Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag is crafted from premium leather, showcasing the brand's classic craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic black Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.

The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap with red and green stripes combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small shoulder bag made from the brand's classic black Gucci Rosso Ancora leather. Gucci Rosso Ancora leather, light gold-tone hardware, leather lining, inside: one zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, top handle (18cm high), detachable webbing shoulder strap (52cm high), hook closure, weight: approx. 0.4kg.
Model: 782849.
Dimensions: 27.5(W) x 19(H) x 4cm(D)
Color: Black/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height 177cm
Max fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, Long wallet, and Lipstick
